title: [MTR4] Iarnród Éireann Class 22000
description: Irish Intercity train for MTR mod!
body:
# Iarnród Éireann Class 22000
Wooo actual irish train made from Scratch!!!
Now MTR4 compatible!!!
![Banner image for LERT IE Class 22000 Version 2, showcasing the updated, now MTR4 compatible train](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22826bd10da0ef1ee02101b1731d9ac91ce199fc.png)
## Features
- The train (duh)
- Custom made BVE sounds
- EXTREMELY OPTIMISED THING

/Loweffortmoment
